mapper.select: SELECT fri.field_name, fri.required, fri.field_type, fri.data_min, fri.data_max, fri.min_length, fri.max_length, fri.pattern, fri.validator, fri.rule_trigger, fri.message FROM mdm_form_rule fr INNER JOIN mdm_form_rule_item fri ON fri.form_rule_code = fr.form_rule_code WHERE fr.deleted = 0 AND fri.deleted = 0 AND fr.api_method = #{apiMethod} AND fr.api_uri = #{apiUri} ORDER BY fri.sort ASC, fri.id ASC
